---
title: "About me"
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/henderson-vo-a1b712275/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/hendersonvo
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:hendersonvo@ucsb.edu
---

![A large tree "cookie" at Calaveras Big Trees State Park](images/tree_cookie.JPG){width="100%" height="400px"}

3 photos of me throughout this page

more sample text

# section 1

# section 2

# section 3
